_huong_dan: Day la file mau. Khi Claude soan de tu file goc cua ban, no se tao ra 1 file 'exam.json' dung cau truc nay, dat trong thu muc rieng cua de do (vd exam-source/reading/de-so-1/exam.json), roi chay: node scripts/push-exam.js exam-source/reading/de-so-1. ExamId duoc sinh CO DINH tu duong dan thu muc (vd exam-source/reading/de-so-1 -> examId 'reading-de-so-1'), nen anh trong de co the tro thang toi /exam-images/<examId-nay>/ten-anh.png ngay tu luc soan, khong can biet ID ngau nhien nao khac. Sua de da day roi thi chay lai lenh cu, them --update vao cuoi.
_huong_dan_skillTag: Moi cau hoi Reading/THPT nen co them field 'skillTag' (dang de bai IELTS thuc su, dung de thong ke do chinh xac theo dang cau trong trang Admin > Hieu suat) — vd: 'True/False/Not Given', 'Multiple Choice', 'Matching Information', 'Matching Headings', 'Matching Sentence Endings', 'Sentence Completion', 'Summary Completion', 'Table/Note/Flow-chart Completion', 'Short Answer Questions'. Claude tu chon tag phu hop khi soan de, khong can hoi lai.
title: IELTS Reading Practice Test 1

passages.title: Passage 1: Ten chu de
passages.html: Noi dung doan van 1 o day. Co the dung tu khoa de to sang.

questions.questionText: According to Passage 1, what is the main cause of X?
questions.explanation: Doan 2 cau 3 cua Passage 1 noi ro nguyen nhan chinh la ... nen dap an la B.

questions.questionText: Complete the sentence: The experiment took place in ____.
questions.explanation: So lieu nam duoc neu truc tiep trong doan 1 cua Passage 2.

tasks.title: Task 1
tasks.promptHtml:
The chart below shows...

Summarise the information...

tasks.title: Task 2
tasks.promptHtml:
Some people think technology has made life more complex...

Write at least 250 words.
